calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-23-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES-BRENDA CRUZ KEITH ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF FREDY PINEDA, PRESENT. DEFENDANTS CARLOS FLORES, RICARDO FLORES, MS. ORTEGA PRESENT WITH SPANISH INTERPRETER MARIAN VITURRO, ALSO PRESENT DEFTS. ATTORNEY YOSEF PERETZ. JUDGE PRO TEM-THOMAS F. MAXWELL, JR.; CLERK-PARAM NATT; REPORTER-MARGARET ASHWELL.

CASE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION BETWEEN PARTIES, TERMS ARE AS FOLLOWS;-JUDGEMENT IS IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANTS FOR POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 2689 BRYANT STREET, SF,CA. DEFTS TO VACATE THE PREMISES BY 5PM ON 8/31/04 AND RETURN KEYS TO AGENT. PLAINTIFF TO PAY DEFTS IN THREE INSTALLMENTS AS FOLLOWS-$4,638.41 ON 8/1/04; $4,638.41 ON 8/31/04; $3,638.79 ON 9/30/04. SECURITY DEPOSIT AND INTEREST ON SECURITY DEPOSIT DISTRIBUTED PER CC 1950.5 ANY DISPUTE TO BE SETTLED IN SMALL CLAIMS COURT. IF DEFT. FAILS TO VACATE ON 8/31/04, WITH 48 HR NOTICE TO DEFT., PLTF TO OBTAIN JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES; FURTHER PLTF TO DEDUCT DAILY DAMAGES AND INTEREST AND ANY MONEY OWED TO PLTF FROM THE FINAL SETTLEMENT AND DEFT IS NOT ENTITLED TO ANY OTHER SUM PER CC 1542. EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN ATTY. FEES AND COSTS. ALL AGREE TO THE TERMS OF THE STIPULATION.

payments.description: FIRST FILING UD COMPLT LESS THAN 2,500
